title: Avenger (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Otheruses|Avenger}}
'''''Avenger''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] that served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Because of her attack in the [[Lesser Plooriod Cluster/Legends|Lesser Plooriod Cluster]], a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] ship that carried [[D3RM3]] with important food supplies for the Alliance, let it off in order to flee. ''Avenger'' sent a squadron of [[TIE series/Legends|TIEs]] to finish it and left.

The ''Avenger'' then took part of an attempt to destroy a [[Habassa]]n convoy above [[Retep V]] following the failure to do so by [[Thrasher (corvette group)|Thrasher]]. It sent [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]] and [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]]. However the fighters and then the frigate were destroyed by Rebel pilot [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]].

{{Ship-stub}}
